name: Signal Club
description: Bass leaks through velvet partitions and every booth looks like a transaction someone will regret later.
detail: Half the room is conducting business and the other half is pretending not to notice.

fixtures.name: velvet booths
fixtures.inspect: Each booth is a tiny republic of bad credit, chemical perfume, and private leverage.

mood: A booth speaker keeps catching half a stranger's voice; the bartender pretends the cable is loose.
Tonight the bass is one-third lower than usual. Mara prefers it that way when she is listening for somebody.
A new perfume is doing the rounds; three regulars have already left without finishing their drinks.
